passages.passage_text: Read the following information and then answer the questions that follow. In the figure the rectangle stands for philosophers, circle for historians and triangle for magicians.
Below is given a figure with four intersecting circles, each representing a group of persons having the quality written against it. Study the figure carefully and answer the questions that follow.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: According to the above diagram, which one of the following statements is true?

choices.a: All philosophers are magicians but no magician is a historian
choices.b: All magicians are either historians or philosophers
choices.c: Some philosophers are historians and some magicians are philosophers
choices.d: Some historians, who are philosophers, are magicians too

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: According to the above diagram, which one of the following statements is true?

choices.b: Some magicians are philosophers as well as historians
choices.c: All historians are either philosophers or magicians

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: According to the above diagram, which one of the following statements is not true?

choices.c: Magicians, who are philosophers are historians also

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In the following diagram, the triangle represents doctors, the circle represents players and the rectangle represents singers. Which region represents doctors who are singers but not players?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The diagram below represents the students who study Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. Study the diagram and identify the region which represents students who study both Physics and Chemistry but not Mathematics.

choices.c: R + T + A + U + P + S

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: People who are not laborious, enterprising and disciplined are represented by

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The region which represents people who are not studious, but possess other three qualities, is denoted by

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The region which represents the people who are enterprising, studious and disciplined but not laborious, is denoted by

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: People who are not studious and disciplined but are laborious and enterprising both, are represented by
